meta.title: Wanderlearn — Learn by standing inside a place
meta.description: A place-based learning platform where every lesson begins with standing inside a real location — captured through 360° photo, 360° video, and drone footage.

landing.headline: Every lesson starts by standing inside a real place.
landing.subhead: Rainforest canopies. Museum galleries. Coral reefs. Chocolate workshops in Mexico City. Captured in 360° and taught through curriculum built on top of the footage.
landing.featureImmersiveBody: Every course is built around a real location captured in 360° photo, 360° video, and drone footage. Not a plugin — the center of the product.
landing.featureCreatorBody: One person with a camera, a drone, and a laptop can publish a full multi-media course. Creators keep full rights to their footage.
landing.featureLearnerBody: Resume across devices, download for offline use, and take courses keyboard-only or with a screen reader. WCAG 2.1 AA from day one.
landing.flagshipDescription: A walk through Mexico City's chocolate museum, tracing cacao from Olmec origins to modern bean-to-bar craft. Launching in English and Spanish.

howItWorks.metaDescription: How a Wanderlearn course works — for learners, for creators, for museums and universities. Place-based learning with no AI-generated content.
howItWorks.headline: Stand inside a real place. Learn from the people who know it.
howItWorks.subhead: Every course is anchored to a location captured in 360° — then a curriculum is built on top of the footage. No stock photos. No AI-generated text. No voice you don't recognize.

learnerSteps.title: Find a place you want to stand inside
learnerSteps.body: Browse courses by destination. Every course is anchored to a real place — a museum hall, a trail, a workshop, a reef. What you see in the preview is what you'll stand inside.

learnerSteps.title: Enroll in one click
learnerSteps.body: Free courses: one click and you're in. Paid courses: one Stripe checkout and you're in. Either way, your enrollment tracks across every device you sign into.

learnerSteps.title: Take lessons one block at a time
learnerSteps.body: Each lesson is a short stack of blocks: a passage of text, a 360° photo you can turn inside, a video, a caption. Keyboard-only works. Screen reader works. WCAG 2.1 AA from day one.

learnerSteps.title: Pick up where you left off
learnerSteps.body: Close the tab on your laptop, open it on your phone. Your last lesson is marked, and the course card says 'Resume where you left off.'

creatorSteps.title: Capture the place
creatorSteps.body: Shoot 360° photos and video with a consumer camera. A single Insta360 + a drone + a laptop is enough to publish a full multi-media course.

creatorSteps.title: Upload to your library
creatorSteps.body: Drag files straight into Wanderlearn — they go to Cloudinary via signed upload (nothing ever hits our server). Name them, tag them, attach a transcript to any video before you publish.

creatorSteps.title: Build destinations and scenes
creatorSteps.body: A destination is a real place. A scene is one vantage point inside it — one 360° photo or video. Build as many scenes per destination as you need, swap in new footage anytime.

creatorSteps.title: Assemble lessons from blocks
creatorSteps.body: Pick a block type — text in Markdown, a 360° photo, a standard video, a 360° video — and compose a lesson. Reorder, edit, delete. Learners see the block order you set.

creatorSteps.title: Publish when it's ready
creatorSteps.body: Set a price (or free), pick a default language, flip the status to published. Paid courses route through Stripe Checkout automatically — the app creates the Stripe Product and Price for you on first purchase.

commitments.title: No AI-generated content
commitments.body: No AI-written lesson text, no AI-fabricated voices, no AI-generated imagery. Every word and frame comes from a human who stood in that place. This is the explicit differentiator.

commitments.title: Accessibility is a launch gate
commitments.body: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance before a course can go public. Transcripts required on every video. 2D fallback required for every 360° asset. Screen-reader smoke tests before every staging push.

commitments.title: Mobile-first from 320 px up
commitments.body: The learner player works on an iPhone SE as well as a 27-inch desktop. No squishing. No 'best viewed on desktop' caveats. Performance budget is enforced at 150 KB gzip above the fold.

commitments.title: Creators keep their footage
commitments.body: Upload to Cloudinary under your account context. Creators retain full rights to the source media. Wanderlearn never claims ownership of your 360° captures.

howItWorks.partnersBody: Wanderlearn is built to partner. The flagship course is a real collaboration with MUCHO Museo del Chocolate in Mexico City. Museums get a dignified way to publish digital tours without a Unity budget. Universities get an ADA-compliant, human-taught alternative to slide decks. If you run an institution and want to explore a partnership, reach out through the support channel after signing in.
howItWorks.ctaHeading: Ready to stand inside a place?
howItWorks.ctaBody: Start with the free MUCHO course. Or sign up and publish your own.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your learning.
auth.birthYearHelp: We ask your age to comply with privacy laws. You must be at least 13 to have an account.
auth.signInError: We couldn't sign you in. Check your email and password.
auth.signUpError: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
auth.ageGateError: You must be at least 13 years old to create a Wanderlearn account.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.magicLinkError: We couldn't send a sign-in link. Check the email and try again.
auth.passkeyError: Passkey sign-in was cancelled or failed.

catalog.title: Courses
catalog.subtitle: Every course is anchored to a real place. Enroll for free where it's free; paid courses arrive once checkout is wired up.
catalog.emptyState: No courses are published yet. Check back soon.

detail.paidNotAvailable: Paid checkout isn't configured yet. The site admin needs to set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.

enroll.errorGeneric: We couldn't enroll you. Please try again.

buy.errorGeneric: We couldn't start checkout. Please try again.
buy.errorNotConfigured: Paid checkout is not configured. Tell the site admin.

checkout.successBody: Payment received for {course}. Jump in whenever you're ready.
checkout.pendingBody: Your payment is still processing. Refresh in a moment — your course access will appear here.
checkout.errorBody: We couldn't verify the payment. If you were charged, email support and we'll sort it out.

receipt.subject: Your Wanderlearn receipt — {course}
receipt.body: Thanks for enrolling in {course}. Your payment of {amount} went through. You'll find the course in your account any time — this email is your receipt.
receipt.support: If anything doesn't look right, reply to this email and we'll make it right.

player.freePreviewBanner: You're viewing this lesson as a free preview. Enroll to unlock the rest of the course.
player.emptyLesson: This lesson has no blocks yet.
player.photo360Missing: The 360° photo for this block isn't available. Tell the creator so they can swap it.
player.video360Missing: The 360° video for this block isn't available. Tell the creator so they can swap it.
player.videoMissing: The video for this block isn't available. Tell the creator so they can swap it.
player.rendererComingSoon: This block type will render once its viewer ships.

complete.completedHint: Come back anytime to revisit this lesson.
complete.errorGeneric: We couldn't save your progress. Please try again.

creator.mediaSubtitle: Every upload is stored in Cloudinary. Files you upload here can be dropped into any course you build.

uploader.label: Upload a new file
uploader.networkError: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

library.title: Your uploads
library.emptyState: You haven't uploaded any files yet. Use the form above to add your first one.
library.noResults: No files match your search. Try a shorter query or clear filters.
library.searchPlaceholder: Search your media by name, description, or tag…
library.namePlaceholder: Give this file a short, clear name
library.descriptionPlaceholder: Notes to help future-you tell this file apart from similar ones
library.transcriptEmpty: Upload a transcript file (.srt, .vtt, .txt) to attach one here.
library.transcriptMissingWarning: The linked transcript was deleted. Pick a different one or leave this empty.
library.softDeletePrompt: Hide this file from your library? You'll still be able to recover it. Choose Delete permanently to remove it from Cloudinary as well.
library.hardDeletePrompt: Delete permanently from Cloudinary. This cannot be undone.
library.inUseBody: Other parts of your courses still reference this file. Replace or remove these references first, then try again.
library.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

scenes.newSubtitle: Give the scene a name, pick a 360° photo from your media library, and save. You'll be able to add hotspots and links between scenes in the next update.
scenes.createdBanner: Scene created. This is what learners will see when they arrive here.
scenes.editSubtitle: Change the name, caption, or panorama. Learners see your updates immediately.

editForm.captionHelp: A short line shown next to the scene in the viewer — optional.
editForm.genericError: We couldn't save the scene. Please try again.

scenes.panoramaMissing: The 360° photo for this scene is missing or still processing. Try again in a moment or delete this scene and recreate it.
scenes.deleteWarning: Deleting a scene removes it from the tour. Any hotspots or scene links attached to it go with it. This cannot be undone.

deleteButton.label: Delete scene
deleteButton.confirmPrompt: Delete scene "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

form.captionHelp: A short line shown next to the scene in the viewer — optional.
form.panoramaEmptyState: You don't have any 360° photos or videos in your media library yet. Upload one first, then come back to create a scene.
form.genericError: We couldn't create the scene. Please try again.

panoramaPicker.heading: Scene media
panoramaPicker.subtitle: Swap the 360° photo or video for this scene. The change applies the moment you save.
panoramaPicker.emptyState: You don't have any other 360° photos or videos ready in your media library.
panoramaPicker.genericError: We couldn't update the panorama. Please try again.

scenes.hotspotsSectionIntro: Hotspots place markers inside this scene's 360° view. Scene links turn this scene into a node in a bigger tour so learners can walk between scenes.

hotspotsEditor.placementHint: Click anywhere inside the 360° view to place the point.
hotspotsEditor.pickOnTourCta: Pick a point on the tour
hotspotsEditor.hotspotsIntro: Markers inside the panorama — a title, optional rich content, optional external link.
hotspotsEditor.hotspotsEmpty: No hotspots yet. Click Add hotspot, then click a point in the view.
hotspotsEditor.hotspotContentHelp: Optional. Shown when the learner opens the marker. Plain text or small HTML.
hotspotsEditor.hotspotUrlHelp: Opens in a new tab from the marker. Include https://.
hotspotsEditor.linksIntro: Arrows that carry the learner from this scene to another scene in the same destination.
hotspotsEditor.linksEmpty: No links yet. Click Add scene link, then click a point in the view.
hotspotsEditor.linksNoOtherScenes: This destination has only one scene. Add a second scene to create links between them.
hotspotsEditor.linkNameHelp: Short text shown next to the arrow.
hotspotsEditor.genericError: We couldn't save. Please try again.
hotspotsEditor.positionMissing: Pick a point in the view first.

blocks.intro: Blocks build the lesson in order. Pick a type to add; quiz and virtual-tour blocks arrive in follow-up branches.
blocks.emptyState: No blocks yet. Add your first one — learners see blocks in the order listed here.
blocks.rendererComingSoon: This block type's renderer arrives in a follow-up branch.
blocks.photo360Missing: The 360° photo for this block is missing or still processing. Edit the block and pick a different one.
blocks.video360Missing: The 360° video for this block is missing or still processing. Edit the block and pick a different one.
blocks.videoMissing: The video for this block is missing or still processing. Edit the block and pick a different one.
blocks.videoNoTranscriptPreview: This video has no transcript linked yet. Learners need one before publish — link it on the video in your media library.
blocks.newTextSubtitle: Write a passage in Markdown. Headings, lists, links, emphasis, and inline code are supported.
blocks.editTextSubtitle: Update the Markdown source. Learners see the rendered output immediately.
blocks.newPhoto360Subtitle: Pick a 360° photo from your library. Learners stand inside it with keyboard or touch controls.
blocks.editPhoto360Subtitle: Swap the 360° photo or update the caption. Learners see changes immediately.
blocks.newVideo360Subtitle: Pick a 360° video from your library. Learners stand inside moving footage with keyboard or touch controls.
blocks.editVideo360Subtitle: Swap the 360° video or update the caption. Learners see changes immediately.
blocks.newVideoSubtitle: Pick a video from your library. A transcript on the video is required before publishing — link it in the media library.
blocks.editVideoSubtitle: Swap the video or update the caption. Learners see changes immediately.

deleteButton.label: Delete
deleteButton.confirmPrompt: Delete this {label} block? This cannot be undone.

textForm.markdownHelp: Markdown with breaks + GFM. HTML is stripped. Max 20,000 characters.

photo360Form.captionHelp: A short line shown below the viewer. Helpful for orienting the learner.
photo360Form.emptyState: You don't have any ready 360° photos in your library yet. Upload one and come back.
photo360Form.genericError: We couldn't save the block. Please try again.

video360Form.captionHelp: A short line shown below the viewer. Use it to orient the learner or highlight a moment.
video360Form.emptyState: You don't have any ready 360° videos in your library yet. Upload one and come back.
video360Form.genericError: We couldn't save the block. Please try again.

videoForm.captionHelp: A short line shown below the player. Useful for context or a figure caption.
videoForm.emptyState: You don't have any ready videos in your library yet. Upload one and come back.
videoForm.genericError: We couldn't save the block. Please try again.
videoForm.noTranscriptWarning: This video has no transcript linked. You can save the block now, but publishing the course will require a transcript on the video.

lessons.newSubtitle: Give the lesson a title. Blocks (text, video, 360°, quiz) come in a follow-up update.
lessons.editSubtitle: Change any field and save. Published lessons are visible to enrolled learners.
lessons.createdBanner: Lesson created. Keep going — add blocks next.
lessons.blocksComingSoon: Text, video, 360° photo, 360° video, and quiz blocks arrive in the next branch.
lessons.deleteWarning: Deleting a lesson removes it along with every block attached. This cannot be undone.

deleteButton.label: Delete lesson
deleteButton.confirmPrompt: Delete lesson "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

form.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. Leave blank to generate from the title.
form.freePreviewHelp: When checked, anyone (even unenrolled users) can take this lesson as a sample of the course.
form.estimatedMinutesHelp: How long a typical learner spends on this lesson. Shown in the course outline.
form.orderIndexHelp: Position in the course. Lower numbers appear first. Leave blank to append to the end.
form.genericError: We couldn't save the lesson. Please check the form and try again.
form.slugTakenError: Another lesson in this course already uses that slug. Pick a different one.

courses.title: My courses
courses.subtitle: A course is what a learner enrolls in. Anchor it to a destination, then build lessons and blocks on top.
courses.newSubtitle: Give the course a title and slug. You can wire it to a destination and add lessons after saving.
courses.editSubtitle: Change any field and save. Learners see updates once the course is published.
courses.emptyState: You haven't created any courses yet. Start with one — you can edit everything later.
courses.createdBanner: Course created. Keep going — add lessons and blocks next.
courses.lessonsIntro: Each lesson is ordered; learners take them top to bottom. Mark one free to preview and anyone can sample it.
courses.lessonsEmptyState: No lessons yet. Create the first one — you can reorder and edit anything later.
courses.noDescription: No description yet. Add one from the edit page.
courses.deleteWarning: Deleting a course removes it along with every lesson and block attached. This cannot be undone.

deleteButton.label: Delete course
deleteButton.confirmPrompt: Delete course "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

form.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. Leave blank to generate from the title.
form.destinationHelp: Anchor this course to a real place. Optional — useful for courses that span multiple sites.
form.priceHelp: Set to 0.00 for free enrollment. Paid courses route through Stripe Checkout once STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is configured.
form.genericError: We couldn't save the course. Please check the form and try again.
form.slugTakenError: A course with that slug already exists. Pick a different slug.
form.feesFree: This course is free — no Stripe fees, no payout. Paid enrollments still need STRIPE_SECRET_KEY set.
form.feesFormula: Estimate: Stripe charges {percent}% + {fixed} per successful card charge (domestic US). Your take-home is the live total below.
form.feesDisclaimer: Estimate only. International cards, disputes, and currency conversion can change the actual fee. Always confirm in your Stripe dashboard.

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Every course is anchored to a real place. Create a destination once, then build scenes and lessons on top of it.
destinations.emptyState: You haven't created any destinations yet. Start with the place you want your first course to live in.
destinations.searchPlaceholder: Search destinations by name, city, or country…
destinations.noResults: No destinations match your search. Try a shorter query.
destinations.newSubtitle: Give the place a name, a slug, and optional map coordinates. You can edit anything later.
destinations.editSubtitle: Change any field and save. Scenes for this destination live in a follow-up step.
destinations.noDescription: No description yet. Add one from the edit page.
destinations.scenesIntro: Each scene is one 360° photo from your media library. Scenes become the stops on the immersive tour.
destinations.scenesEmptyState: No scenes yet. Create the first one from a 360° photo in your media library.

heroPicker.heading: Hero image
heroPicker.subtitle: The image learners see at the top of this destination. Choose a photo or a 360° photo from your library. You can swap it any time.
heroPicker.emptyState: You don't have any ready images or 360° photos in your library yet.
heroPicker.genericError: We couldn't save the hero image. Please try again.

destinations.scenesComingSoon: Scenes for this destination arrive in a follow-up update. You'll build the immersive tour from 360° photos you've uploaded to the media library.
destinations.createdBanner: Destination created. Keep going — add details below when you're ready.
destinations.deleteWarning: Deleting a destination removes it and any scenes attached to it. This cannot be undone.

form.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. Leave blank to generate from the name.
form.latHelp: Decimal degrees. Positive for North, negative for South. Range: -90 to 90.
form.lngHelp: Decimal degrees. Positive for East, negative for West. Range: -180 to 180.
form.websiteHelp: Official site for the destination, if there is one. Include the full URL with https://.
form.genericError: We couldn't save. Please check the form and try again.

admin.usersSubtitle: Change a user's role. Only other admins will be visible here.

errors.notFoundTitle: This place isn't on the map yet
errors.notFoundBody: The page you were looking for doesn't exist on Wanderlearn. It may have been moved, renamed, or never existed at this URL. Let's get you back on track.
